====== Ar (10) into Carbon Slab                 =======
        SRIM-2013.00
========================================
        Final ION DISTRIBUTION        
 This is a special 3-D array of 100x100 values.  
 These values can be used as input to other graphics software.

 See file :  SRIM Outputs\TDATA.txt   for calculation data
 Ion    = Ar   Energy = 25 keV
============= TARGET MATERIAL ======================================
Layer 1 : Carbon Slab
Layer Width = 15000.E-01 A ;
  Layer # 1- Density = 9.526E22 atoms/cm3 = 1.9 g/cm3
  Layer # 1-  C = 100  Atomic Percent = 100  Mass Percent
====================================================================
 Total Ions calculated =010000.00

       ION DISTRIBUTION Units are  >>>>  (Atoms/cm3)/(Atoms/cm2)  <<<<  
=============================================================================

  TARGET     The depth values are in the first column, on the left.

  (Ang)      The Beam enters the target at column #50 of the top row.
